markdown:
# Periapt of Health

While wearing this pendant, you can take a [[magic]] action to regain 2d4 + 2 [[hit_points]]. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

In addition, you have [[advantage]] on saving throws to avoid or end the [[poisoned]] condition while you wear this pendant.
